prices.title: Prices
prices.description: Choose the package that best fits you and your pet. Every session is personal, unhurried, and tailored to bring out the best in your animal.

cta.text: Not sure what package fits you? Let's talk

mini.title: Mini
mini.description: A focused 30-minute outdoor session at one location. Perfect for a single pet portrait or a quick spontaneous shoot.
mini.imageAlt: Dog running through a sunlit field during a mini photography session

standard.title: Standard
standard.description: A relaxed 1-hour session at up to two locations. Ideal for capturing multiple moods and moments with your pet.
standard.imageAlt: Dog posing in an autumn forest during a standard photography session

premium.title: Premium
premium.description: A full 2-hour session across multiple locations, including a home studio option. The complete experience for pet owners who want it all.
premium.imageAlt: Dogs playing together in a field during a premium photography session
